selection.summary: Secure Riverwatch's frontier corridor, seize Duskfen Bastion, and break the marsh raiders before Mireclaw pressure collapses the pass.
selection.player_summary: Lyra Emberwell leads an Embercourt vanguard from Riverwatch Hold with an immediate foothold on the pass.
selection.enemy_summary: The Mireclaw Warhost holds Duskfen Bastion and feeds the road with raid pressure from the marsh.

objectives.victory_text: River Pass holds. Duskfen Bastion now answers to Riverwatch.
objectives.defeat_text: The Mireclaw warhost breaks the pass before Lyra can secure it.

defeat.label: Keep Riverwatch Hold under your banner
Lyra must survive the campaign
Do not let Mireclaw pressure reach 8

effects.text: With the Blackbranch camp broken, frontier carters reopen the north road.
A relief column reaches Riverwatch with pay chests and fresh shield bearers.
Captured signal fires draw a Mireclaw counterstroke out of the marsh.
The mire drains back from the old stones, leaving Lyra with a hard-won lesson in command.
Riverwatch rings the basin bells and every free shield along the pass is dragged back onto the walls.
Unbroken reed totems keep the warhost in rhythm, drawing another reaver band down the north road.

selection.summary: Drive along the Reedfall causeway, hold Duskfen as a staging ground, and break Blackfen Gate before the counterhost seals the marsh road.
selection.player_summary: Lyra Emberwell begins with a marshhead at Duskfen and must turn that staging post into a sustained advance.
selection.enemy_summary: The Blackfen Counterhost defends the gate, launches northern counterraids, and punishes overextension across the reeds.

objectives.victory_text: Lyra locks the causeway under Embercourt lanterns and Blackfen Gate falls silent.
objectives.defeat_text: The Mireclaw counteroffensive swallows Duskfen and closes the road through the marsh.

defeat.label: Keep Duskfen Bastion under your banner
Lyra must survive the campaign
Do not let Mireclaw pressure reach 10

effects.text: Veterans from River Pass arrive with repaired wagons and enough supplies to keep the advance moving.
The stones Lyra cleansed at Hollow Mire reveal a survey cache along the causeway.
With the Reedward camp broken, Duskfen's shuttered archive is reopened and its quartermasters release a surveyor's tally rod from sealed stores.
Signal drums roll across the reeds as a Mireclaw counterraid slips around the northern bank.
Levee cutters leave the north bank open, and Mireclaw pours fresh pressure into the causeway flank.

selection.summary: Push beyond Blackfen Gate, secure the ferry lanes, and break the covenant's crown redoubt before the marsh command can regroup.
selection.player_summary: Lyra begins from a captured Blackfen bridgehead with the full campaign carryover and must finish the Reedfall offensive.
selection.enemy_summary: The Fen Crown host falls back to an inner redoubt, strikes by ferry, and tries to retake the bridgehead through escalating raids.

objectives.victory_text: The Fen Crown redoubt falls, and Reedfall's marsh command finally breaks.
objectives.defeat_text: Lyra loses the bridgehead before the last marsh redoubt can be taken.

defeat.label: Keep Blackfen Gate under your banner
Lyra must survive the campaign
Do not let Fen Crown pressure reach 12

effects.text: Broken gate marshals leave the bridgehead clear enough for Embercourt veterans and spare shot to reinforce Lyra.
With the Reedward camp already broken, scouts reopen a fordside cache behind the Crown Isle advance.
When the Crown Watch is broken, the captured redoubt archive yields charts and spell leaves from the inner marsh.
Reed ferries slip through the mist and dump a last desperate raid on the southern bank.
Bone Ferry stays in enemy hands long enough to keep the inner marsh ferries running hot with reinforcements.

selection.summary: Hold Highwater Keep, secure Willow Mill, and seize Murkward Ford before the inland host cuts the Stonewake Basin open.
selection.player_summary: Caelen Ashgrove leads a basin watch from Highwater Keep and must turn a mill-country defense into a crossing.
selection.enemy_summary: The Murkward Host presses inland roads from a drowned ford while reavers raid the mills and levees.

objectives.victory_text: Stonewake's mill rim holds, and Murkward Ford falls under Embercourt beacons.
objectives.defeat_text: The inland host breaks Highwater Keep before Caelen can secure the basin crossing.

defeat.label: Keep Highwater Keep under your banner
Caelen must survive the campaign
Do not let Murkward pressure reach 8

effects.text: Millwright wagons roll into Highwater with grain tallies, spare tools, and a fresh levy from the basin farms.
Broken sluice raiders leave their survey cache behind the floodgates.
Willow Mill's wardens reopen the grain boats and Caelen turns the victory into a hard lesson in command.
Caelen relights Murkward's ford beacons, turning the captured stockade into a basin crossing station.
Mill horns echo across Stonewake and farm levies crowd back into Highwater's gatehouse.
Unbroken reed totems keep Murkward's scouts aligned, and another reaver file sweeps in from the ford road.

selection.summary: Launch from captured Murkward Ford, clear the barrow levees, and take Reedbarrow Ferry before the covenant isolates the crossing.
selection.player_summary: Caelen begins from the captured ford with Stonewake carryover and must turn it into a lasting inland bridgehead.
selection.enemy_summary: Reedbarrow's lashers defend the ferry chain, launch counterraids along the levees, and punish any stalled advance.

objectives.victory_text: Reedbarrow Ferry falls and the Stonewake crossing becomes a true bridgehead.
objectives.defeat_text: The lashers isolate Murkward Ford before Caelen can break the ferry chain.

defeat.label: Keep Murkward Ford under your banner
Caelen must survive the campaign
Do not let Reedbarrow pressure reach 10

effects.text: Willow Mill boatmen slip downriver with grain, dry bowstrings, and a veteran file for the bridgehead.
Because Murkward's beacons were relit in time, Caelen inherits a working signal loft and a recovered chart room.
With the barrow pickets scattered, basin scouts mark a hidden route toward the Nightglass marsh.
Drums on the upper levee warn of a counterraid slipping around Reedbarrow's north bank.
Murkward's beacon chain flashes a warning and Caelen drags every spare bowstring back to the bridgehead.
Levee totemists keep Reedbarrow's lashers coordinated, and another marsh file slips in behind the ferry road.

field_objectives.label: Reedbarrow Chain Nets
field_objectives.summary: The ferry-chain nets own the opening lane unless the bank is taken immediately.

field_objectives.label: Barrow Levee Gap
field_objectives.summary: If the levee gap goes hostile, the close fight starts to collapse fast.

selection.summary: Use Reedbarrow Ferry as a bridgehead, clear the mirror causeway, and break the Nightglass shrine-redoubt before the basin host regroups.
selection.player_summary: Caelen begins from a captured ferry bridgehead with full inland carryover and must finish the Stonewake counteroffensive.
selection.enemy_summary: The Nightglass Covenant retreats to a shrine-redoubt, hammers the roads with drum-guided raids, and tries to retake the ferry line.

objectives.victory_text: Nightglass Redoubt falls and the Stonewake Basin finally clears of covenant command.
objectives.defeat_text: The ferry bridgehead is lost before Caelen can break the Nightglass shrine-redoubt.

defeat.label: Keep Reedbarrow Ferry under your banner
Caelen must survive the campaign
Do not let Nightglass pressure reach 12

effects.text: Cut ferry chains leave enough intact hulls for veterans, ore, and spare shot to reinforce the bridgehead.
Because the levee route was marked at Reedbarrow, scouts uncover a hidden cache behind the Nightglass marsh.
When the Nightglass drum circle falls silent, shrine charts and beacon codes finally fall into Caelen's hands.
If Caelen cannot break Nightglass quickly, the Dominion barges and drum-fords come alive, hardening the redoubt into a fresh late-war surge point.
Nightglass sends one last raft-borne raid around the reeds in a final bid to snap the bridgehead.
Caelen's ferry signals hold long enough to pull one more reserve watch over the levee into the bridgehead.
Nightglass keeps a Bone Ferry screen on the water long enough to push fresh raiders past Caelen's flank.

field_objectives.label: Nightglass Shrine Ring
field_objectives.summary: The shrine ring's pulse starts dragging cohesion apart as soon as the chant settles.

field_objectives.label: Nightglass Silt Sink
field_objectives.summary: The drowned approach keeps punishing the side that fails to seize the firmer lane.

selection.summary: Rally Duskfen, cut the survey line, and seize Riverwatch Hold before Embercourt relief hardens the charter road.
selection.player_summary: Vaska Reedmaw leads a Mireclaw counterthrust from Duskfen and must turn raids into a full road seizure.
selection.enemy_summary: Riverwatch Relief answers with scout columns, survey guards, and steady pressure along the charter road.

objectives.victory_text: Riverwatch falls silent under Mireclaw drums and the charter road buckles apart.
objectives.defeat_text: Embercourt relief hardens the road, crushes Duskfen, and breaks Vaska's counterthrust.

defeat.label: Keep Duskfen Bastion under your banner
Vaska must survive the campaign
Do not let Embercourt pressure reach 8

effects.text: When the Lantern Patrol breaks, mire scouts drag a seized waystone cache back onto the road.
Oath-bound warrens answer Duskfen's fires with fresh blades and sling stones.
Captured river charts expose every hidden channel, but they also draw one last relief column back toward the hold.
Survey crates and charter ledgers teach Vaska exactly where the road can be cut deepest.
Duskfen's wardens answer the rising road pressure with fresh cutters and sling crews from the inner warrens.
Archive wardens keep the charter ledgers intact, and Riverwatch throws another survey-backed column onto the road.

selection.summary: Turn the captured road into a Mireclaw march, break the granary levies, and burn toward Highwater Keep before Embercourt stabilizes the basin.
selection.player_summary: Vaska advances from seized river holdings with one ford already in hand and must stretch the charter line until it snaps.
selection.enemy_summary: The Granary Charter answers with beacon wardens, levy columns, and sustained road pressure out of Highwater Keep.

objectives.victory_text: The charter road burns from riverbank to granary and Highwater's outer line collapses.
objectives.defeat_text: Embercourt restores the road net, contains the counterthrust, and forces Mireclaw back into the marsh.

defeat.label: Keep Riverwatch Hold under your banner
Keep Murkward Ford under your banner
Do not let Embercourt pressure reach 10

effects.text: Because Riverwatch's channels were marked, Mireclaw runners find a hidden crossing cache on the first march.
Seized survey wagons are broken apart into spare stakes, ore, and fresh sling stones at Murkward.
With the levy columns broken, Highwater's storehouse ledgers and tally rods are finally exposed.
The beacon line goes dark and the charter roads open all the way to Highwater's walls.
Highwater sends one more beacon-led road column to cut the captured line in two.
Bridgeward levies keep the marsh crossings intact, and the Granary Charter pushes another road chaplain column into the breach.

selection.summary: Drive the broken road net into Highwater's heartland, cut the chaplain column, and end the charter war before Embercourt reforms.
selection.player_summary: Vaska reaches the final charter belt with two captured mustering points and must turn that foothold into a finishing blow.
selection.enemy_summary: The Highwater Charter Host falls back on chaplain columns, reserve guards, and desperate counterpressure out of the keep.

objectives.victory_text: Highwater falls and the charter marches drown beneath Mireclaw drumfire.
objectives.defeat_text: Embercourt holds the keep long enough to rebuild its roads and break the counteroffensive.

defeat.label: Keep Riverwatch Hold under your banner
Keep Murkward Ford under your banner
Do not let Embercourt pressure reach 11

effects.text: With the charter road already ripped open, Vaska's warbands begin the final surge with extra stores and fresh brutes.
Scattered beacon maps reveal one last cache hidden in the weeds north of Riverwatch.
When the road chaplains fall, their signal corpses leave the basin's last command rhythm in ruins.
The charter guard breaks with Highwater's ledgers in tow, gifting Vaska the basin's last tally rod.
If Highwater still stands on the fourth day, the Charter Bastion goes live and throws another disciplined reserve column into the basin.
Highwater's remnant captains throw one last lantern-led road raid around the flooded verge.
Highwater's archive wardens keep the basin ledgers intact, and the charter host squeezes one more raid out of the road net.

selection.summary: Mira Flintmere must turn Highwater's bridgehead into a clean advance, retake Murkward Ford, and keep the marsh raiders off the road.
selection.player_summary: Mira Flintmere commands an Embercourt bridge column built for initiative swings, reserve trains, and hard town retakes.
selection.enemy_summary: The Ford Reclaimers answer with brutes, silt hunters, and repeated raids out of Murkward.

objectives.victory_text: Mira locks the ironbridge line, retakes Murkward, and turns the ford into a true League bridgehead.
objectives.defeat_text: The bridgehead collapses under Mireclaw pressure and Murkward remains a raider gate into the basin.

defeat.label: Keep Highwater Keep under your banner
Mira must survive the expedition
Do not let Mireclaw pressure reach 9

effects.text: Once the Silt Hunters are cleared, Mira's bridge sappers recover a reserve cache above the flooded road.
A reserve train from Highwater reaches the bridgehead with pay chests, pikes, and fresh archers.
Murkward's signal drums are doused, but the sound brings one last marsh raid up the southern bank.
Mira blows the bridgehorn and reserve line wardens sprint back toward Highwater's battered bridgehead.
Reed totemists keep the flooded channels marked, and another marsh raid spills toward Mira's bridge line.

selection.summary: Hold Prismhearth, relight Halo Spire, and break the Mireclaw saboteur bands before the Compact's relay chain collapses.
selection.player_summary: Solera Prismarch leads a Sunvault relief column from Prismhearth and must turn a shrinking ward line into a real bridgehead.
selection.enemy_summary: Mireclaw saboteurs hold Halo Spire, raid the south bank, and try to drown the relay chain under mounting pressure.

objectives.victory_text: Halo Spire burns bright again, and the Compact holds a live relay chain across the march.
objectives.defeat_text: Prismhearth falls silent before Solera can reclaim the tower line.

defeat.label: Keep Prismhearth under your banner
Solera must survive the campaign
Do not let Mireclaw pressure reach 8

effects.text: Reserve shard crews reach Prismhearth with fresh mirrors, pay chests, and another drilled relay detachment.
With Halo Spire reclaimed, Sunvault relay crews relight the upper lenses and reopen a sealed signal cache.
Mireclaw rafts slide across the south bank as soon as Prismhearth's main lane looks secure.
Unbroken Glasswing spotters keep the mire lanes marked and draw another saboteur band onto the relay flank.
The broken Halo Reserve leaves behind intact relay plates and a sharper sense of how Sunvault wants to fight.

field_objectives.label: Prismhearth Lens Lane
field_objectives.summary: The hearth lenses sharpen the opening volley until the lane is wrested away.

field_objectives.label: Prismhearth Signal Relay
field_objectives.summary: The signal relay keeps the Compact line synchronized and command hard to expose.

selection.summary: Advance from Halo Spire, tear open the charter road, and seize Riverwatch before Embercourt can stabilize the crossings.
selection.player_summary: Solera begins from reclaimed Halo Spire and must turn a restored relay into a sustained Compact offensive.
selection.enemy_summary: Embercourt wardens hold Riverwatch, counterbattery the road, and rely on bridgeward levies to keep the lane closed.

objectives.victory_text: The charter road is broken and Riverwatch's crossing falls under Sunvault command.
objectives.defeat_text: Embercourt reties the road line before Solera can force the crossing.

defeat.label: Keep Halo Spire under your banner
Solera must survive the campaign
Do not let Embercourt pressure reach 10

effects.text: Salvaged relay plates from Halo Spire reach the front and let Solera field another calibrated firing line.
Because Halo Spire was fully relit, Sunvault scouts open a sealed relay cache behind the road push.
Riverwatch's captured ledgers and tide charts mark the channels Solera will need for the final push.
Riverwatch's lane wardens roll a counterbattery onto the north rise as soon as Halo Spire looks secure.
If the Archive Wardens stand too long, Embercourt keeps the road beacons burning and pushes fresh chaplains onto the flank.

selection.summary: Launch from broken Riverwatch, reclaim the old daybreak array, and shatter Nightglass before Mireclaw can drown the Compact again.
selection.player_summary: Solera begins from the captured road bridgehead and must convert the charter breach into a final Compact offensive.
selection.enemy_summary: Mireclaw falls back to Nightglass, uses ferry raids to keep pressure high, and tries to keep the daybreak array out of Sunvault hands.

objectives.victory_text: Nightglass breaks and the Sunvault Compact turns a single live relay into a stable frontier network.
objectives.defeat_text: The Compact is drowned out at the last line before Solera can reclaim the old array.

defeat.label: Keep Riverwatch under your banner
Solera must survive the campaign
Do not let Mireclaw pressure reach 11

effects.text: Broken bridgeward levies leave the road clear enough for reserve arrays and convoy stores to reach Solera.
Captured Riverwatch charts keep the side channels open long enough to reveal a hidden supply cache.
When the daybreak array is reclaimed, Sunvault crews recover an old war pennon and rewire Riverwatch into the relay net.
If Solera cannot crack Nightglass in time, the Dominion ring comes online and the marsh spits another hunter pack onto the line.
Nightglass ferries dump another raid onto the south bank as soon as Riverwatch looks fully stabilized.
If Bone Ferry stands too long, Mireclaw keeps the inner marsh ferries running and pushes fresh pressure into the march.

selection.summary: Advance out of Highwater, break Sunvault relay screens, and seize Prismhearth before the Compact turns the field into a battery line.
selection.player_summary: Caelen Ashgrove leads an Embercourt column into the Glassfen and must keep pressure on Prismhearth before the arrays synchronize.
selection.enemy_summary: The Sunvault Compact holds Prismhearth, launches relay pickets and glasswing sorties, and punishes any slow advance with prepared fire lanes.

objectives.victory_text: Prismhearth falls and Embercourt breaks the Glassfen arrays before Sunvault can lock the lane.
objectives.defeat_text: The Compact turns the front into a killing ground before Caelen can reach Prismhearth.

defeat.label: Keep Highwater under your banner
Caelen must survive the front
Do not let Sunvault pressure reach 9

effects.text: Highwater's mills send another pay chest and a fresh line of wardens to keep Caelen's push alive.
Breaking the outer relay screens leaves the Glassfen edge scattered with usable crystal stock and chart cases.
Sunvault duelists cut a reflected lane along the south bank as soon as Highwater looks stable.
If Prismhearth remains unbroken into the late fight, the Daybreak Matrix aligns its relays and feeds one more glasswing sortie into the front.
As long as the Aurora Battery holds, Prismhearth can keep feeding fresh relay screens into the front.
Caelen scatters the Glasswing spotters and gains a clearer read on how Sunvault layers its battery lanes.

field_objectives.label: Glassfen Firing Prism
field_objectives.summary: The fog-edge prism still turns the lane into a firing gallery unless it is overrun.

field_objectives.label: Glassfen Watch Relay
field_objectives.summary: The watch relay keeps Sunvault command steadier through the marsh haze.
